title_original: PM Wong outlines plan to keep S’pore a global innovation hub; growth areas include quantum tech - Yahoo News Singapore
summary_original: Prime Minister Wong outlined a plan to maintain Singapore's status as a global innovation hub, specifically identifying quantum technology as a key growth area. This focus highlights the nation’s strategic intent to invest in cutting-edge scientific and technological domains. The announcement underscores the continued governmental support for quantum research and development in 2024, aiming to secure Singapore’s competitiveness and relevance in the fast-evolving global landscape of advanced technologies. No additional speakers, precise funding amounts, or technical breakthroughs were detailed in the provided source.
